canonical_answer: A cartoon pig wearing polka-dotted clothing lies surrounded by red, yellow, green, blue, and purple balloons on a book cover. Red capital letters at the top spell the title 'IF YOU GIVE A PIG A PARTY' above author credits. A red rectangular Scholastic logo rests at the bottom center while a white square logo for Simplified Behavioral Health overlays the bottom left corner.
